content: Café Zenith POS system logs show a transaction for two herbal teas and one almond milk latte on 14.10.2023 at 10:37:12 PM. Receipt printed at 10:37:15 PM. The receipt presented as evidence (Receipt ID: CZ-1014-23-089) was manually altered — the timestamp was changed from 10:37:15 PM to 10:30:00 PM using administrative override. The override was performed using the manager’s credentials, which were accessed by Arjun Singh on 15.10.2023 at 3:15 AM. The system logs confirm the original receipt was printed at 10:37 PM. No other transactions from Rohan Kapoor were recorded before or after. CCTV from café entrance shows Rohan Kapoor entering at 10:37:08 PM, Arjun Singh already seated.
